subject: Fw: Fwd: (no subject)
body:
Dear Jeffrey

Sultan has spoken to me and I am excited about the opportunity.

Please touch base with me on my cell phone 011 971506523372 whenever you get the chance as I would like to understand from you how you forsee us participating. 

Following that, I will send you the customary list of due diligence issues and questions that I hope you can help me out with.

Thanks and I look forward to your call. 
Regards
Dr Lai Boon, Yu
Group Chief Investment Officer
Dubai World

Sent Remotely Using BlackBerry

----- Original Message -----
From: ssulayem@aol.com <ssulayem@aol.com>
To: Laiboon Yu
Sent: Fri Sep 21 06:39:17 2007
Subject: Fwd: (no subject)

er
dear laiboon
  comunicate with mr jefffrey epstein board member and investment 
advisor to the wexner family

-----Original Message-----
From: ssulayem@aol.com
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Fri, 21 Sep 2007 6:33 am
Subject: Re: (no subject)






Dear Jeffrey 

please contact my cheif investment officer Dr YU Laibooon 
 

e mail : laiboon.yu@nakheel.com 

tel : 011 971506523372 
 
dear sultan

we should move forward  . if you want I can speak  directly to your
financial people.

jeffrey
